user.title: Choose Starling features
user.description: Select which parts of your Starling account you want to use. Required token permissions are shown next to each feature.

token.title: Connect Starling Bank Enhanced
token.description:
Create a Personal Access Token with the required permissions for the selected features: {permissions}. Paste the token below.

Validation details: {validation_details}

select_entities.title: Choose Starling entities
select_entities.description: Select which balances and Spaces should be created, which Space categories to include, and how much history to keep.

data.upcoming_limit: Number of upcoming scheduled payments to keep
data.history_limit: Number of recent transfers to keep
data.show_savings_account_spaces: Create separate Space sensors for this savings account

reconfigure.title: Reconnect Starling Bank Enhanced
reconfigure.description:
Update the token for this account. Required permissions for the enabled features: {permissions}

Validation details: {validation_details}

account.title: Choose account
account.description: Choose which Starling account should be used for this entry. Validation details: {validation_details}

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Starling API
error.no_entities_selected: Select at least one balance or Space
error.permissions_not_ok: Token validation failed for one or more selected features. See validation details below.

abort.wrong_account: The provided token belongs to a different Starling account.
abort.reconfigure_successful: The Starling connection was updated successfully.

init.title: Update Starling entities
init.description: Choose which balances and Spaces should stay enabled, which Space categories to include, and how much history to keep.

data.upcoming_limit: Number of upcoming scheduled payments to keep
data.history_limit: Number of recent transfers to keep
data.show_savings_account_spaces: Create separate Space sensors for this savings account
